name: Masaru Kurosaki
description: One of [Haga's](https://anilist.co/character/301224/Makoto-Haga) coworkers on the debug team from Nerima Tech.

name: Masumi Kamuro
description: Masumi Kamuro is a student of Class 2-A and a member of the Art Club. She is one of the members of the inner circle of Sakayanagi faction but is shown to be only interested in doing so as Sakayanagi has some information about her criminal history.

name: Michela McFarlane
nativeName: ミシェーラ＝マクファーレン
description: A friend of [Oliver](https://anilist.co/character/258618/Oliver-Horn)'s and a member of the Sword Roses. Chela is a proud young lady and the eldest daughter of the noble house of McFarlane, one of the five oldest families in Yelgland, and among the elite in the Magical World. She is an incredibly skilled mage, and often serves as the Sword Roses' voice of reason alongside Oliver as the two most mature members of the group.
searchTerms: ミシェーラ＝マクファーレン

name: Michiyo Gotou
description: Hitori and Futari's mother.

name: Mio Aoyama
description: __Class:__ 2-A __Height:__ 149 cm She is known as the rich girl of Maishima Academy. However, her father passed away over a year ago and has been living in an run down apartment since then. She is the second heroine to appear in the series. ~!Keima describes her as tsundere, based on her appearance; cat eyes, light hair colour, visible forehead and pigtails. He also claims that he has seen character like her 300 times in games. She seems to have some sadistic nature towards Keima.!~
mediaTitles: The World God Only Knows II

name: Mio Kanzaki
description: __Height:__ 172 cm __Affiliation:__ Hakuto High School __Occupation:__ Student Mio Kanzaki is a 2nd year student at Hakuto High School and a member of its koto club.

name: Mirai Onozawa
description: A middle-schooler whose relationship with her dual-income parents is a bit shaky. She is in the middle of a rebellious stage and has a shy personality. Her brother calls her a Mobile Alien because she's always using her phone. When she was waiting for her brother outside exhibition hall, she was typing on her phone, wishing for the world to break apart.

name: Misaki Gundou
description: She is Misuzu's mother.

name: Mitsuki Sonoda
description: __Height:__ 160 cm Mitsuki is a 3rd year student at Misato West High School and also the student council president. Her younger sister is [Yuu](https://anilist.co/character/86387/Yuu-Sonoda).

name: Momota
description: Thoughtless, rude, and often crude, Momo has no qualms with using men for sex and money, all while keeping an overly happy persona. (Source: MAL)

name: Nana Oukami
description: Clerk at Sunny's Pet Store with a fondness for cats. She helps Subaru learn to care for Haru. Has two cats, one of which being Haru's younger brother.

name: Naomasa Tsukauchi
description: Naomasa Tsukauchi is a police detective in the Police Force. Naomasa is a tall man with short black hair and black eyes. As a member of the police force, he is normally seen in his uniform. He wears a signature tan overcoat and a matching hat. He also sports a black suit underneath with matching slacks and dress shoes. Detective Tsukauchi is an earnest, hardworking individual who has earned the right to be a close friend of All Might. Enough so, that he was even entrusted with the truth about On

name: Natsuki Usami
description: __Height:__ 178 cm A native of Enoshima, Natsuki has black hair and glasses, with a generally irritated expression. He doesn't seem to like interacting with many people but is well known for his participation in national fishing competitions, resulting in the nickname, "Fishing Prince". He has a soft spot for his younger sister, Sakura, his entire demeanor changing when talking with her

name: Natsume Mochizuki
description: Female main character. Model that transfers from Tokyo to the rural area. Even though her father is opposed to her modeling she continues. Falls in love with Kouichiro.

name: Oshizu Hebimori
description: Class 1-3, student number 15. She'd always wanted to play the guitar, but she's never played it properly yet. She's a girl with a lot of problems. (Source: Official Site, Translated)

name: Pierre Tempete Neige
nativeName: ピエール・タンペート・ド・ネージュ
description: Pierre is a popular and handsome boy at Chocolat's school, but he has a cold heart, and is not as innocent as he looks. He's the captain of the fencing and tennis teams of the school and has a fan club of beautiful but cruel and cold junior-high student girls known as 'The Members', who apparently dislike Chocolat being near their Prince. Almost nobody can resist his charisma and charm. He has white blonde hair and piercing, sharp ice blue eyes ~!It is discovered in Volume 2, that Pierre is also
searchTerms: ピエール・タンペート・ド・ネージュ

name: Porche
description: Porche is a member of the Foxy Pirates, and is considered an idol by the crew and is loved by all of the men. She participates in the Donut Race. Her personality is like that of a very arrogant girl who lacks intelligence. She is very loyal to Foxy, but also has a huge obsession with Chopper since he's so cute. She refers to him as "Choppy", prefers for him to stay in his Brain Point form (When he turns into his Jumping Point form she yelled "What happened to Choppy?! That's not cute at all!)."

name: Rosine
description: Rosine is a female apostle who sacrificed her parents to obtain the form of a female elf with the wings and antennae of a luna moth, as well as a small pair of moth-like limbs near her hips and a 'helmet' similar to the head of a luna moth. Her motivation for doing so was the legend of a child named Peekaf who believed himself an Elf and in doing so lost his human parents. description: Akane's classmate and natural enemy. He has trouble getting along with Akane, always quarreling with her. He's smart and always places at the top of the class, but he lacks common sense in his daily life. Married Akane so he could succeed his grandfather to control the Houjou Group.

name: Saki Iwasawa
description: A high school student and the tallest of her three friends. She is unmotivated but very good at sports and games. Saki is considered the tsukkomi to Kanaka's boke act.
